description: Public JSON Schema contract for a connection's local secrets file (`credentials.json`) — a flat map of connection-input (or post-auth output) name to that input's secret value (any JSON type; the engine string-coerces on read, so prefer strings). A connection document's `secret_refs.<name>` entry, via the `sidecar:<name>` scheme, resolves to the value stored here under the same `<name>`. Kept out of source control; the shape is published so a plugin author can validate a credentials template against it. Source of truth: k2m.models.credentials_file.CredentialsFile (Pydantic).
title: Analitiq Connection Credentials
